CustomField.description: This is used within V.RULE_OPP_027, Opp.INF_Analytics_AVC & P.FLOW_2000 to determine cut over the date when the Related_Market_Analytics field is no longer used. (RITM0097554)
CustomField.inlineHelpText: This is used within V.RULE_OPP_027, Opp.INF_Analytics_AVC & P.FLOW_2000 to determine cut over the date when the Related_Market_Analytics field is no longer used. (RITM0097554)
CustomField.label: FLD_Dep_OPP_Related_Market_Analytics
